functions.name: instance_create_layer
functions.description: Creates an instance on a room layer and returns its id.

functions.name: instance_create_depth
functions.description: Creates an instance at a depth and returns its id.

functions.name: instance_destroy
functions.description: Destroys self or a target instance.

params.name: id
params.description: Target instance id, defaults to self

functions.name: instance_exists
functions.description: Checks whether an instance or object currently exists.

functions.name: instance_number
functions.description: Returns how many instances of an object exist.

functions.name: instance_find
functions.description: Returns the nth instance of an object or noone.

functions.name: place_meeting
functions.description: Tests whether a collision would happen at a position.

functions.name: position_meeting
functions.description: Tests whether a point overlaps a target.

functions.name: instance_place
functions.description: Returns the colliding instance at a test position.

functions.name: instance_position
functions.description: Returns the instance at a point or noone.

functions.name: collision_rectangle
functions.signature: collision_rectangle(x1, y1, x2, y2, obj, prec, notme)
functions.description: Returns an instance overlapping a rectangle.

functions.name: collision_circle
functions.signature: collision_circle(x, y, rad, obj, prec, notme)
functions.description: Returns an instance overlapping a circle.

functions.name: collision_line
functions.signature: collision_line(x1, y1, x2, y2, obj, prec, notme)
functions.description: Returns an instance intersecting a line.

functions.name: collision_point
functions.description: Returns an instance colliding with a point.

functions.name: draw_self
functions.description: Draws the instance's current sprite normally.

functions.name: draw_sprite
functions.description: Draws a sprite frame at a position.

functions.name: draw_text
functions.description: Draws text at a position.

functions.name: draw_rectangle
functions.description: Draws a filled or outlined rectangle.

functions.name: draw_circle
functions.description: Draws a circle at a position.

functions.name: draw_set_color
functions.description: Sets the current drawing color state.

params.name: col
params.description: Color to use for future draws

functions.name: draw_set_alpha
functions.description: Sets the current drawing alpha state.

functions.name: draw_set_font
functions.description: Sets the current font for text drawing.

functions.name: draw_set_halign
functions.description: Sets horizontal text alignment.

functions.name: draw_set_valign
functions.description: Sets vertical text alignment.

functions.name: draw_surface
functions.description: Draws a surface at a position.

functions.name: surface_exists
functions.description: Checks whether a surface id is valid.

functions.name: surface_create
functions.description: Creates a surface and returns its id.

functions.name: gpu_set_blendmode
functions.description: Sets the GPU blend mode for later draws.

functions.name: room_goto
functions.description: Transitions to a target room.

functions.name: room_goto_next
functions.description: Transitions to the next room in order.

functions.name: room_goto_previous
functions.description: Transitions to the previous room in order.

functions.name: room_restart
functions.description: Restarts the current room.

functions.name: room_get_info
functions.description: Returns room metadata as a struct.

functions.name: layer_get_id
functions.description: Returns a layer id from its name.

functions.name: layer_add_instance
functions.description: Adds an existing instance to a layer.

params.name: inst
params.description: Instance id to place on layer

functions.name: layer_sequence_create
functions.description: Creates a sequence instance on a layer.

functions.name: sequence_get
functions.description: Returns sequence asset data as a struct.

functions.name: layer_exists
functions.description: Checks whether a named layer exists.

functions.name: keyboard_check
functions.description: Checks whether a key is currently held.

functions.name: keyboard_check_pressed
functions.description: Checks whether a key was pressed this frame.

functions.name: keyboard_check_released
functions.description: Checks whether a key was released this frame.

functions.name: mouse_check_button
functions.description: Checks whether a mouse button is held.

functions.name: mouse_check_button_pressed
functions.description: Checks whether a mouse button was pressed.

functions.name: mouse_check_button_released
functions.description: Checks whether a mouse button was released.

functions.name: device_mouse_check_button
functions.description: Checks a mouse or touch button on a device.

functions.name: gamepad_is_connected
functions.description: Checks whether a gamepad slot is connected.

functions.name: gamepad_button_check
functions.description: Checks whether a gamepad button is held.

functions.name: gamepad_button_check_pressed
functions.description: Checks whether a gamepad button was pressed.

functions.name: gamepad_button_check_released
functions.description: Checks whether a gamepad button was released.

functions.name: gamepad_axis_value
functions.description: Returns a normalized gamepad axis value.

functions.name: ord
functions.description: Returns the code of the first character.

functions.name: audio_play_sound
functions.description: Starts playing a sound and returns a playback id.

functions.name: audio_stop_sound
functions.description: Stops a sound asset or playback id.

functions.name: audio_pause_sound
functions.description: Pauses a sound asset or playback id.

functions.name: audio_sound_gain
functions.description: Changes gain immediately or over time.

functions.name: audio_create_stream
functions.description: Creates a streamed sound from a file.

functions.name: audio_play_sound_at
functions.signature: audio_play_sound_at(sound, x, y, z, falloff_ref, falloff_max, falloff_factor, loop, priority)
functions.description: Plays a sound in 3D space.

functions.name: audio_group_load
functions.description: Loads an audio group into memory.

functions.name: audio_group_unload
functions.description: Unloads an audio group from memory.

functions.name: audio_group_is_loaded
functions.description: Checks whether an audio group is loaded.

functions.name: abs
functions.description: Returns the absolute value of a number.

functions.name: floor
functions.description: Rounds a number down.

functions.name: ceil
functions.description: Rounds a number up.

functions.name: round
functions.description: Rounds a number to the nearest integer.

functions.name: clamp
functions.description: Clamps a value into a range.

functions.name: sign
functions.description: Returns -1, 0, or 1 from a number sign.

functions.name: lerp
functions.description: Linearly interpolates between two values.

functions.name: damp
functions.description: Smoothly damps a value toward a target. [Added in 2024.x]

functions.name: point_distance
functions.description: Returns the distance between two points.

functions.name: point_direction
functions.description: Returns the direction from one point to another.

functions.name: lengthdir_x
functions.description: Returns the X offset for a length and direction.

functions.name: lengthdir_y
functions.description: Returns the Y offset for a length and direction.

functions.name: sin
functions.description: Returns the sine of an angle in radians.

functions.name: cos
functions.description: Returns the cosine of an angle in radians.

functions.name: tan
functions.description: Returns the tangent of an angle in radians.

functions.name: arcsin
functions.description: Returns the inverse sine of a value.

functions.name: arccos
functions.description: Returns the inverse cosine of a value.

functions.name: arctan2
functions.description: Returns the angle from X and Y components.

functions.name: random
functions.description: Returns a random real from 0 up to n.

functions.name: irandom
functions.description: Returns a random integer from 0 to n.

functions.name: choose
functions.description: Returns one randomly chosen argument.

functions.name: string
functions.description: Converts a value to a string.

functions.name: string_length
functions.description: Returns the number of characters in a string.

functions.name: string_pos
functions.description: Returns the first position of a substring.

functions.name: string_copy
functions.description: Copies a substring from a string.

functions.name: string_replace
functions.description: Replaces the first matching substring.

functions.name: string_lower
functions.description: Returns a string in lowercase.

functions.name: string_upper
functions.description: Returns a string in uppercase.

functions.name: string_split
functions.description: Splits a string into an array of substrings.

functions.name: array_length
functions.description: Returns the number of items in an array.

functions.name: array_push
functions.description: Appends one or more values to an array.

functions.name: array_pop
functions.description: Removes and returns the last array value.

functions.name: array_insert
functions.description: Inserts a value into an array.

functions.name: array_delete
functions.description: Deletes one or more values from an array.

functions.name: array_copy
functions.description: Copies a range of values between arrays.

functions.name: array_contains
functions.description: Checks whether an array contains a value.

functions.name: array_sort
functions.description: Sorts an array in place.

functions.name: array_map
functions.description: Returns a mapped array using a callback.

functions.name: array_filter
functions.description: Returns a filtered array using a callback.

functions.name: array_reduce
functions.description: Reduces an array to one accumulated value.

functions.name: ds_map_create
functions.description: Creates a ds_map and returns its id.

functions.name: ds_map_add
functions.description: Adds a key-value pair to a ds_map.

functions.name: ds_map_find_value
functions.description: Returns a ds_map value or undefined.

functions.name: ds_map_exists
functions.description: Checks whether a ds_map key exists.

functions.name: ds_map_delete
functions.description: Deletes a key from a ds_map.

functions.name: ds_map_destroy
functions.description: Destroys a ds_map and frees memory.

functions.name: ds_list_create
functions.description: Creates a ds_list and returns its id.

functions.name: ds_list_add
functions.description: Adds one or more values to a ds_list.

functions.name: ds_list_find_value
functions.description: Returns a value from a ds_list position.

functions.name: ds_list_size
functions.description: Returns how many values a ds_list holds.

functions.name: ds_list_delete
functions.description: Deletes a value from a ds_list.

functions.name: ds_list_destroy
functions.description: Destroys a ds_list and frees memory.

functions.name: ds_grid_create
functions.description: Creates a ds_grid and returns its id.

functions.name: ds_grid_set
functions.description: Sets a value in a ds_grid cell.

functions.name: ds_grid_get
functions.description: Gets a value from a ds_grid cell.

functions.name: ds_grid_clear
functions.description: Fills every cell in a ds_grid.

functions.name: ds_grid_destroy
functions.description: Destroys a ds_grid and frees memory.

functions.description: Creates a ds_priority queue.

functions.name: ds_priority_destroy
functions.description: Destroys a ds_priority queue.

functions.name: ds_stack_create
functions.description: Creates a ds_stack and returns its id.

functions.name: ds_stack_destroy
functions.description: Destroys a ds_stack and frees memory.

functions.name: ds_queue_create
functions.description: Creates a ds_queue and returns its id.

functions.name: ds_queue_destroy
functions.description: Destroys a ds_queue and frees memory.

functions.name: json_stringify
functions.description: Converts a struct or array to JSON text.

functions.name: json_parse
functions.description: Parses JSON text into structs and arrays.

functions.description: Opens a text file for reading.

functions.description: Opens a text file for writing.

functions.name: file_text_open_append
functions.description: Opens a text file for appending.

functions.name: file_text_read_string
functions.description: Reads a string token from a text file.

functions.name: file_text_read_real
functions.description: Reads a real value from a text file.

functions.description: Writes a string to a text file.

functions.name: file_text_writeln
functions.description: Writes a line break to a text file.

functions.name: file_text_close
functions.description: Closes an open text file handle.

functions.name: file_exists
functions.description: Checks whether a file exists.

functions.description: Opens an INI file for reading and writing.

functions.description: Writes a real value into an INI file.

functions.name: ini_close
functions.description: Closes the currently open INI file.

functions.name: network_create_socket
functions.description: Creates a network socket.

functions.name: network_connect
functions.description: Connects a socket to a host and port.

functions.name: network_send_packet
functions.description: Sends bytes from a buffer through a socket.

functions.name: network_send_raw
functions.description: Sends raw data through a socket.

functions.name: buffer_create
functions.description: Creates a buffer and returns its id.

functions.name: buffer_write
functions.description: Writes a typed value into a buffer.

functions.name: buffer_tell
functions.description: Returns the current cursor position in a buffer.

functions.name: buffer_delete
functions.description: Deletes a buffer and frees memory.

functions.name: http_get
functions.description: Starts an HTTP GET request and returns its id.

functions.name: http_post_string
functions.description: Starts an HTTP POST request with a string body.

functions.name: event_perform
functions.description: Runs another event on the current instance.

functions.name: event_inherited
functions.description: Runs the inherited parent event code.

functions.name: event_user
functions.description: Runs a user event on the current instance.

functions.name: variable_instance_exists
functions.description: Checks whether an instance variable exists.

functions.name: variable_instance_get
functions.description: Gets a variable value from an instance.

functions.name: variable_global_exists
functions.description: Checks whether a global variable exists.

functions.description: Checks whether a struct field exists.

functions.description: Gets a field value from a struct.

functions.description: Sets a field value on a struct.

functions.name: move_towards_point
functions.description: Sets direction and speed toward a point.

functions.name: show_debug_message

functions.name: camera_create_view
functions.signature: camera_create_view(view_x, view_y, view_w, view_h, angle, target, hborder, vborder, hspeed, vspeed)
functions.description: Creates a camera configured as a view.

functions.name: view_set_camera
functions.description: Assigns a camera to a view slot.

functions.name: camera_get_view_width
functions.description: Returns the view width of a camera.

functions.name: camera_get_view_height
functions.description: Returns the view height of a camera.

functions.name: camera_set_view_pos
functions.description: Sets the top-left position of a camera view.

functions.name: shader_set
functions.description: Activates a shader for future draw calls.

functions.name: shader_reset
functions.description: Resets rendering back to the default shader.

functions.name: shader_get_uniform
functions.description: Gets a uniform handle from a shader.

functions.name: shader_set_uniform_f
functions.description: Writes float uniform values to a shader.

variables.name: x
variables.description: The instance X position in the room.

variables.name: y
variables.description: The instance Y position in the room.

variables.name: id
variables.description: The unique id of the current instance.

variables.name: object_index
variables.description: The object asset index of the current instance.

variables.name: self
variables.description: Reference to the current instance in scope.

variables.name: other
variables.description: Reference to the paired instance for certain event scopes.

variables.name: global
variables.description: Namespace used to access global variables.

variables.name: image_index
variables.description: Current subimage index for the assigned sprite.

variables.name: image_speed
variables.description: Speed at which the sprite animation advances.

variables.name: sprite_index
variables.description: The sprite currently assigned to the instance.

variables.name: depth
variables.description: The draw depth of the instance.

variables.name: alarm
variables.description: Array of alarm countdown slots for the instance.

variables.name: persistent
variables.description: Whether the instance survives room changes.

variables.name: room
variables.description: The current room asset index.

variables.name: room_speed
variables.description: The current game step rate.

variables.name: mouse_x
variables.description: Mouse X position in room coordinates.

variables.name: mouse_y
variables.description: Mouse Y position in room coordinates.

variables.name: view_enabled
variables.description: Whether the legacy view system is enabled.

variables.name: view_visible
variables.description: Visibility flags for view slots.

variables.name: current_time
variables.description: Current elapsed time in milliseconds.

variables.name: application_surface
variables.description: Default application surface id.

variables.name: async_load
variables.description: DS map payload supplied to async events.

variables.name: event_type
variables.description: The type of the event currently running.

variables.name: event_number
variables.description: The sub-event number currently running.

variables.name: working_directory
variables.description: The runtime working directory path.

variables.name: game_save_id
variables.description: Per-game writable save location root.

constants.name: noone
constants.description: Represents the absence of an instance.

constants.name: mb_left
constants.description: Mouse button constant for left click.

constants.name: gp_axislh
constants.description: Gamepad constant for left horizontal axis.

constants.name: gp_axislv
constants.description: Gamepad constant for left vertical axis.

constants.name: network_type_connect
constants.description: Async networking constant for connection success.

constants.name: network_type_data
constants.description: Async networking constant for incoming data.

constants.name: buffer_grow
constants.description: Buffer type that grows when needed.
